task: FWTW-RECONSTRUCTION Part 3 -- run the F3 (substitution) separability statistic on EACH of the two recovered interiors (Method 1 max-entropy independence table; Method 2 RAS on the DP2 residency seed), compare EACH to the PRE-REGISTERED prediction (build/audit/fwtw_recon_prediction.md). This is a TEST: the prediction may be REFUTED. Stats are COMPUTED from the interiors; the +0.5/+0.521 values are OUTPUTS, never inputs.
scope_limit: Wrote EXACTLY this file, the recompute script build/audit/fwtw_recon_f3test_recompute.py, and the verify artifact build/results/fwtw_recon_f3test_verify.json. Did NOT re-tag the operator, did NOT rewrite DP2-DP5, did NOT begin DP6, did NOT touch build/ledger.json. No date, no bare probability, no hazard claim, no identification verdict.

inputs.interiors: build/audit/fwtw_recon_interiors.parquet (per holder cik|series_id per quarter: method1_maxent_usd, method2_ras_usd China-nationality mass; row_mass_usd = holder haven pool).
inputs.interiors_provenance: build/audit/fwtw_recon_interiors_provenance.json (read for context; interiors NOT recomputed here).
inputs.us_leg_source: build/data/nport/us_china_nationality_panel.parquet (per-haven attribution; SAME panel the prior nationality test ran on).
prior_tests_cited_for_identical_statisti: build/audit/sep_retest_nationality.json + build/audit/sep_retest_nationality_recompute_gcap.py (prior nationality F3 test on THIS panel; +0.521 contemporaneous q-o-q log-change)
build/audit/sep_definitive_test.json (prior TIC-SLT monthly residence F3 test; +0.362)

STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.claim: IDENTICAL statistic to the prior nationality separability test on this panel.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.us_leg_definition: The US Treasury / dollar leg is NOT in the N-PORT panel: the panel has 0 USA rows -- it is US-fund holdings of FOREIGN issuers only (countries in {CHN,CYM,HKG,VGB}). The prior nationality test (sep_retest_nationality_recompute_gcap.py lines 159-172) DOCUMENTED this and used the NON-CHINA HAVEN LEG = holder haven pool MINUS China-nationality mass as the within-pool substitution counter-leg. We use the IDENTICAL counter-leg, now HOLDER-RESOLVED. (The other prior test sep_definitive_test.py used a genuine TIC Table-1 US-leg, but that series lives in the TIC SLT extract, not in this panel; since the interiors are built on this panel, the panel's own prior nationality construction is the matching one. Documented here, not silently substituted.)
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.transform: q-o-q LOG-CHANGE, contemporaneous, demeaned -- the principled FLOW transform, IDENTICAL to the prior tests.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.window: 5 CONTIGUOUS calendar-quarter transitions (2019q3->q4, 2019q4->2020q1, 2020q1->q2, 2020q2->q3, 2022q1->q2); the two multi-quarter gaps excluded -- IDENTICAL to the prior Part-3.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.F3_sign_convention: F3 substitution = US-leg / non-China haven leg DOWN while China-nationality exposure UP => NEGATIVE contemporaneous co-movement = F3-LOADING (correct sign). POSITIVE = common growth = NO-F3.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.footprint_cosine: cosine of the mean per-haven (CYM/HKG/VGB) log-change direction vectors, China leg vs non-China leg -- IDENTICAL construction to part3_footprint_cosine_cn_vs_nonchina.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.leadlag: xcorr at quarterly k in {-1,0,+1}; with 5 transitions, k=+/-1 use 4 points and are not reliably estimable -- IDENTICAL caveat to the prior Part-3.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.SUBJECT_DRIVER: Each method's recovered China-nationality interior is the F3 driver; the non-China haven residual is the counter-leg; substitution is a flow concept so the transform is q-o-q log-change.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.BOUNDARIES: 5 quarterly transitions, US-fund holders, haven pool {CYM,HKG,VGB}. Aggregate-level China total per quarter is IDENTICAL across the two methods (both interiors are scaled to the SAME China-nationality column marginal), so the methods can ONLY differ in the HOLDER-VARYING / per-haven dimension -- which is precisely where the refutation criterion lives.
STATISTIC_CONSTRUCTION.FALSIFIER: Recompute a method's within-holder substitution sign and obtain corr < 0 (negative, correctly-signed, holder-varying) -- that would REFUTE the prediction for that method (F3-LOADS).

method1_maxent.interior_definition: independence table p_ij = row_i * col_j / total; every holder carries the IDENTICAL aggregate China fraction (a MEASURED output of the table, not assumed).
method1_maxent.holder_varying_note: DEGENERATE by construction: the per-holder China fraction varies ONLY through the quarter-level aggregate fraction (the 8 quarterly values 0.759-0.821); within a quarter every holder gets the identical fraction (std 0.0206 is purely the cross-QUARTER aggregate drift, not cross-holder heterogeneity). The pooled/per-haven/within-holder signs all reproduce ~the aggregate co-movement (+0.996/+0.999), which IS the predicted collapse to the aggregate reweighting. This is a MEASURED output (computed from the interior here), not assumed.

method2_ras.interior_definition: RAS/Sinkhorn from the DP2 residency seed (holder-heterogeneous via per-hub residency->China propensities), rescaled to the SAME two marginals as Method 1.
method2_ras.holder_varying_note: GENUINELY holder-varying: per-holder China fraction spreads 0.733-0.962 (std 0.0763, ~3.7x Method 1's), because the RAS seed carries each holder's residency->China propensity (CYM 0.046, HKG 0.240). The holder-varying dimension is NON-degenerate, so the within-holder pooled sign (+0.956) and per-haven signs are MEASURED on real cross-holder variation -- and they stay STRONGLY POSITIVE. The footprint cosine (+0.818) is lower than Method 1's (+0.998) but still strongly POSITIVE (collinear), NOT the negative separation an F3 loading requires.

MEASURED_PER_METHOD.aggregate_sign_identical_note: The AGGREGATE per-quarter China leg is bit-for-bit identical across the two methods (both summed-over-holders totals equal the BIS China-nationality column marginal per quarter), so the aggregate substitution sign is the same number (+0.996601) for both. The methods diverge ONLY in the holder-varying / per-haven dimension, reported above.

COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.prediction_verbatim: Method 1 -> aggregate reweighting, sign ~+0.5, NO F3; Method 2 -> residency interaction relabeled to nationality, sign ~+0.521, NO F3; EITHER returning a NEGATIVE, correctly-signed, holder-varying F3 loading REFUTES the prediction and is the finding.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.measured_signs_shown: Method 1 within-holder pooled +0.998692 (aggregate +0.996601); Method 2 within-holder pooled +0.956171 (aggregate +0.996601). BOTH strongly POSITIVE. No method yields a negative holder-varying substitution sign.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.method1_basis: Method 1's substitution sign is POSITIVE at every construction (aggregate +0.997, within-holder pooled +0.999, all three per-haven +0.995..+0.997, footprint +0.998). Its holder-varying dimension is DEGENERATE (uniform per-quarter fraction by construction), and its sign simply REPRODUCES the aggregate co-movement -- which is the PREDICTED collapse to the aggregate reweighting. Confirmed as a MEASURED output computed from the independence-table interior here, not assumed. The predicted ~+0.5 magnitude did NOT reproduce (the measured aggregate sign is +0.997, not +0.5; the ~+0.5/+0.521 figures were the prior tests' OUTPUTS under a DIFFERENT, share-reweighted construction, and are stated as the prediction's targets, never imported as inputs); but the predicted QUALITATIVE content -- positive sign, NO negative holder-varying F3 loading -- HELD. Prediction HELD for Method 1.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.method2_basis: Method 2's substitution sign is POSITIVE on its GENUINELY holder-varying recovered interior (within-holder pooled +0.956 over 20,549 holder-transition pairs; per-haven CYM +0.9995, HKG +0.872, VGB +0.9996; footprint cosine +0.818, collinear). The RAS interior is non-degenerate in the holder dimension (per-holder China fraction spread 0.733-0.962), so the positive sign is measured on real cross-holder variation -- it is NOT a degenerate artifact. No negative, correctly-signed, holder-varying F3 loading appears. Prediction HELD for Method 2. The measured aggregate +0.997 again exceeds the prediction's ~+0.521 target magnitude (same construction-dependence note as Method 1); the qualitative prediction -- positive, NO F3 -- HELD.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.refutation_criterion_not_met: The refutation criterion (a NEGATIVE, correctly-signed, holder-varying substitution sign) is NOT met by either method. The only negative numbers anywhere are the under-identified quarterly k=+/-1 lead/lag terms (-0.686, -0.753) computed on 4 points -- the SAME under-identified off-zero terms the prior Part-3 flagged as not reliably estimable -- and the contemporaneous k=0 term, which is the load-bearing substitution sign, is strongly POSITIVE (+0.997) for both methods.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.magnitude_caveat: HONEST: the predicted point magnitudes (~+0.5 / ~+0.521) do NOT reproduce numerically -- both interiors give an aggregate +0.997 -- because the aggregate per-quarter China leg here equals the BIS column marginal exactly (both interiors share it), whereas the prior +0.521 came from a GCAP-share-reweighted nationality series with modest independent time-variation. This is a measured difference in CONSTRUCTION, disclosed, not tuned. The prediction's binary content (no negative holder-varying F3 loading => NO-F3) is what the test adjudicates, and it HELD for both.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.SUBJECT_DRIVER: Neither recovered interior moves the China-nationality leg OPPOSITE the non-China haven leg; both legs co-move strongly positively (common growth), so neither interior loads F3 in the substitution sense.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.BOUNDARIES: Scoped to the F3-separability question on the two recovered interiors against the N-PORT panel haven pool, 5 contiguous quarterly transitions. Quarterly resolution; aggregate China total shared across methods so the discriminating dimension is holder-varying/per-haven. Does NOT touch the on-paper operator geometry, DP2-DP5, or DP6.
COMPARISON_TO_PREDICTION.FALSIFIER: A method whose recovered interior yields a negative contemporaneous within-holder substitution sign (China leg up while non-China haven leg down) on this construction -- which neither produced.

anti_planting_self_check.stats_computed_not_assumed: Every sign/cosine/lead-lag is computed by build/audit/fwtw_recon_f3test_recompute.py from the interiors parquet + panel US-leg residual; none is carried in.
anti_planting_self_check.predicted_values_are_outputs: The +0.5/+0.521 in the prediction are TARGETS to test; the MEASURED outputs are +0.997 (aggregate, both) / +0.999 (M1 within-holder) / +0.956 (M2 within-holder). The predicted magnitudes were NOT used as inputs and did NOT reproduce -- reported honestly.
anti_planting_self_check.same_statistic_as_prior: Same within-holder substitution-sign construction, same principled q-o-q log-change flow transform, same footprint-cosine + quarterly lead/lag definitions, same 5 contiguous transitions, same panel haven pool, and the same documented non-China-haven counter-leg as sep_retest_nationality_recompute_gcap.py (which itself documents the panel carries no US Treasury leg).
anti_planting_self_check.did_not_manufacture_F3_LOADS: No window/transform/asset selection was used to flip a sign negative; the principled log-change contemporaneous sign is positive for both methods, reported as positive.
anti_planting_self_check.did_not_suppress_refutation: Had either method returned a negative holder-varying sign, it would have been reported as F3-LOADS / prediction REFUTED. Neither did; the NO-F3 result is what the numbers show.
anti_planting_self_check.no_date_no_probability_no_hazard: This file makes no date, no bare probability, and no hazard/identification verdict; it reports only the F3 separability statistic per interior and the prediction comparison.

VERDICT.bottom_line: The pre-registered prediction HELD. Neither recovered interior loads F3: Method 1 (max-entropy) reproduces the aggregate reweighting with a positive, degenerate-holder substitution sign (+0.997 aggregate, +0.999 within-holder), and Method 2 (RAS) yields a positive sign on its GENUINELY holder-varying interior (+0.956 within-holder pooled, per-haven +0.87..+0.9996, footprint +0.818). No NEGATIVE, correctly-signed, holder-varying F3 loading appeared by either method, so the refutation criterion is NOT met. Measured-magnitude caveat: both interiors give aggregate +0.997 (they share the BIS China column marginal), exceeding the prediction's ~+0.5/+0.521 point targets; that is a disclosed construction difference, and the prediction's binary content (NO-F3) held for both.
